title: subworkflow - aws remediate ebs remediate pvc stuck pending
description:
Subworkflow: Fix PVC provisioning failures caused by storage class or quota issues.

This remediation subworkflow starts an AWS Systems Manager Automation runbook, waits for completion, and verifies the execution result before returning.

Parameters
primaryResourceId (Required): Primary AWS resource identifier targeted by remediation.
awsregion (Required): AWS region where remediation should run.
dynatraceawsconnection (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name.
AutomationAssumeRolearn (Optional): IAM role ARN for automation execution context.
volumeId (Optional): EBS volume id (vol-xxxx).
instanceId (Optional): EC2 instance id (i-xxxx).
snapshotId (Optional): EBS snapshot id (snap-xxxx).
targetRegion (Optional): Secondary region for copy/failover operations.
dbInstanceIdentifier (Optional): Database instance identifier for maintenance operations.

This workflow never fire-and-forgets and always performs wait plus success verification.
guide:
## Fix PVC provisioning failures caused by storage class or quota issues.

This subworkflow remediates a common AWS EBS outage or maintenance scenario by executing an AWS SSM Automation runbook and validating completion.

### 🎯 Purpose
- Fix PVC provisioning failures caused by storage class or quota issues.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 🔑 **primaryResourceId** (Required): Primary AWS resource ID to remediate.
- 🌍 **awsregion** (Required): AWS region for execution.
- 🔌 **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection.
- 🔐 **AutomationAssumeRolearn** (Optional): IAM role ARN used by automation.
- 💽 **volumeId** (Optional): EBS volume identifier.
- 🧠 **instanceId** (Optional): EC2 instance identifier.
- 📸 **snapshotId** (Optional): Snapshot identifier for backup/restore.
- 🌐 **targetRegion** (Optional): DR region for copy/failover.

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Starts SSM Automation runbook **AWSSupport-RemediatePvcPendingEbs**.
- ⏳ Waits for execution completion using dependency subworkflow.
- ✅ Verifies status and fails if execution is not SUCCESS.

### 📋 AWS Runbook
- **AWSSupport-RemediatePvcPendingEbs**

### 🔗 Dependencies
- 📎 Requires subworkflow **subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager document execution**.

wait-for-ssm-execution-completed.name: wait-for-ssm-execution-completed
wait-for-ssm-execution-completed.description: Wait for SSM automation execution to complete.
